productDisplayName: Nike Men Solid Navy Blue Shorts
description: CompositionDark navy blue running shorts made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has an attached underwear on the inside, elasticated waistband with a drawstring, blue panel detailing on the sides and swoosh logo in a reflective material towards the left hemlineWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) FittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryBuilt with breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike running shorts comes in a simple design with blue accents. This high-performance short created from Dri-Fit fabric wicks sweat away and keeps you cool, dry and comfortable. Team it with tees and running shoes.
